criteriaCoverage.originalIntent: Implement plans 019-022 exactly: diagnostics redaction tests, state-store tests, blocking pinned Ruff CI, telemetry design spike, and plan index updates.
criteriaCoverage.desiredOutcome: Regression guards and docs/CI changes land without runtime custom_components source changes or telemetry wiring.
criteriaCoverage.userOutcomeReview: Outcome matches the four plan contracts; no custom_components source edits; no push or PR performed.
